'''''Reasonable Doubt''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Kut-Rate Kruise Lines]].

==History==
Originally, ''Reasonable Doubt'' was named '''''Asymptotic Approach to Divinity''''', and was constructed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Verpine. It was originally intended as a pilgrim boat; however, when no buyer could be found, she was renamed '''''Stardust''''' and used as a tourist cruiser. During a tour of the anticipated nova of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Ariarch-17]], a shockwave caused the dramatic failure of the ship's [[Wikipedia:Artificial gravity|artificial gravity]] systems. Many lawsuits ensued, and litigation lasted two generations. ''Stardust'' was seized by the lawyers defending the cruise company and sold off to Kut-Rate Kruises after she was renamed ''Reasonable Doubt''.

''Reasonable Doubt'' was the ship that carried [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Maks Leem]], and [[Jai Maruk]], as well as [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] and [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]], on a secret [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] to meet with [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}
